name: Embedding Job Processor
description: Processes pending embedding jobs through registered embedding providers.

inputSchema.name: Model Ref
inputSchema.description: Optional embedding model id or provider/model filter.

inputSchema.name: Limit
inputSchema.description: Maximum pending jobs to process in this run.

inputSchema.name: Retry Failed Jobs
inputSchema.description: Reset failed embedding jobs to pending before processing.

inputSchema.name: Batch Size
inputSchema.description: Number of embedding jobs to send in one provider embedding request. Use 1 for single-request compatibility.

inputSchema.name: Source Kinds
inputSchema.description: Optional list of retrieval source kinds to process as one lane.

inputSchema.name: Time Budget Seconds
inputSchema.description: Optional maximum processing time for this drain run.

inputSchema.name: Include Retry Wait
inputSchema.description: Allow due retry-wait jobs to resume in this scoped drain.

inputSchema.name: Maintenance Only
inputSchema.description: Run queue maintenance and status synchronization without generating embeddings.

outputSchema.name: Processed Count
outputSchema.description: Number of embedding jobs processed in this run.

outputSchema.name: Completed Count
outputSchema.description: Number of jobs completed in this run.

outputSchema.name: Failed Count
outputSchema.description: Number of jobs marked failed in this run.

outputSchema.name: Retry Wait Count
outputSchema.description: Number of jobs moved to retry-wait in this run.

outputSchema.name: Blocked Count
outputSchema.description: Number of jobs blocked by non-retryable errors in this run.

outputSchema.name: Retried Failed Count
outputSchema.description: Number of failed jobs reset to pending in this run.

outputSchema.name: Reset Stale Running Count
outputSchema.description: Number of expired running jobs returned to the queue.

outputSchema.name: Reset Dimension Mismatch Count
outputSchema.description: Number of blocked dimension-mismatch jobs reset after a default model dimension probe.

outputSchema.name: Remaining Count
outputSchema.description: Number of eligible jobs still remaining in the same scope.

outputSchema.name: Ready Memory Job Count
outputSchema.description: Number of ready memory embedding jobs discovered during queue maintenance.

outputSchema.name: Ready Knowledge Operation Count
outputSchema.description: Number of ready knowledge indexing operations discovered during queue maintenance.

outputSchema.name: Synced Operation Count
outputSchema.description: Number of knowledge indexing operations synchronized during queue maintenance.

outputSchema.name: Processed Jobs
outputSchema.description: Audit records for each processed job.

outputSchema.name: Maintenance Report
outputSchema.description: Queue maintenance and operation sync report.

zh-CN.name: Embedding 任务处理器
zh-CN.description: 通过已注册的 embedding provider 处理待执行的 embedding jobs，也可执行队列维护与状态同步。

en-US.name: Embedding Job Processor
en-US.description: Processes pending embedding jobs through registered embedding providers.
